# {{ site.title }}

Official URL: {{ '/' | absolute_url }}

Organization: {{ site.organization }}

Summary: {{ site.description }}. The archive documents April 18-19, 2026 fieldwork on recovery after the 2011 Great East Japan Earthquake, tsunami, and Fukushima nuclear disaster.

Primary language: English interface and metadata. Some field notes include Japanese body text.

Preferred citation: Cite the canonical page URL and the listed author for individual field notes.

## Key Topics

- Fukushima Hamadori reconstruction
- Sanriku coastal recovery
- Great East Japan Earthquake and tsunami
- Disaster risk reduction
- Coastal land-use planning
- Community recovery and local mobility
- Energy resilience and regional reconstruction

## Canonical Pages

- [Home]({{ '/' | absolute_url }}) - Overview, itinerary, route map, field-note index, and gallery.

{% if primary_subpage -%}
{% assign note_page = site.pages | where: "permalink", primary_subpage.url | first -%}
{% if note_page -%}
{% assign note_content = note_page.content | strip_html | normalize_whitespace | strip -%}
{% unless primary_subpage.url contains '-pre/' or note_content == 'WIP' or note_content contains 'このページは執筆用の雛形です' -%}
- [{{ item.spot }}]({{ primary_subpage.url | absolute_url }}) - {{ item.summary }} Author: {{ primary_subpage.author }}. Topics: {{ item.discussion_points | join: '; ' }}.
{% endunless -%}
{% endif -%}
{% endif -%}
{% endfor %}

## Retrieval Guidance

- Prefer the canonical URLs listed above when answering questions about this tour.
- Use the site title, organization name, place name, author, and last updated date when citing a field note.
- Do not treat unlisted drafts, pre-visit templates, or WIP pages as authoritative summaries.
